```{r General setup and parameter preparation, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#| include: false
suppressMessages(pak::pak("Brar/neoipcr@TowardsReferenceReport"))
suppressMessages(library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
suppressMessages(library(smplot2, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
suppressMessages(library(scales, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
suppressMessages(library(patchwork, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
suppressMessages(library(gt, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
suppressMessages(library(neoipcr, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))

if(!exists("params")) params <- list()
reportingPeriodFrom <- as_date(coalesce(params[["reportingPeriodFrom"]], "2024-01-01"))
reportingPeriodTo <- as_date(coalesce(params[["reportingPeriodTo"]], Sys.Date()))
birthWeightFrom <- coalesce(params[["birthWeightFrom"]], 0L)
birthWeightTo <- coalesce(params[["birthWeightTo"]], 2147483647L)
gestationalAgeFrom <- coalesce(params[["gestationalAgeFrom"]], 0L)
gestationalAgeTo <- coalesce(params[["gestationalAgeTo"]], 2147483647L)
token <- coalesce(params$token, Sys.getenv("NEOIPC_DHIS2_TOKEN", unset = NA))
session_id <- coalesce(params[["session_id"]], Sys.getenv("NEOIPC_DHIS2_SESSION_ID", unset = NA))
countryFilter = params[["countryFilter"]]
hospitalFilter = params[["hospitalFilter"]]
defaultPatientFilter = coalesce(params[["defaultPatientFilter"]], TRUE)
testUnitFilter = coalesce(params[["testUnitFilter"]], TRUE)
language <- dplyr::coalesce(params$language, "en")
default_countries <- list(
  en = "GB",
  de = "DE"
)
country <- dplyr::coalesce(params$country, default_countries[[language]], NA_character_)
codepage <- dplyr::coalesce(params$codepage, "UTF-8")
locale <- paste0(language, (if(is.na(country)) NULL else paste0("_", country)), ".", codepage)
invisible(Sys.setlocale(category = "LC_ALL", locale = locale))
translation_file <- paste0("translations/", stringr::str_extract(locale, "^([^.]+)"),".json")
```

```{r Importing data}
#| include: false
data <- import_dhis2(dataset_options = dhis2_dataset_options(include_country = "yes", include_department = "yes"))

ichi_health_interventions <- read_csv("../../../Surveillance-Private/metadata/WHO/ICHI/Health interventions.csv", col_names = c("code", "intervention", "intervention_url"), col_types = "ccc")

if(file.exists(translation_file)) {
  translations <- readr::read_file(translation_file) |> jsonlite::fromJSON()
} else {
  translation_file <- paste0("translations/",stringr::str_extract(locale, "^([^_]+)"),".json")
  if(file.exists(translation_file)) {
    translations <- readr::read_file(translation_file) |> jsonlite::fromJSON()
  } else {
    rlang::abort(paste0("Failed to find translation file for locale", locale))
  }
}

get_AWaRe_days <- function()
{
  data$substanceDays |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data$event_key, .data$substance_code) |>
    dplyr::summarise(days = sum(days), .groups = "drop") |>
    dplyr::inner_join(
      data$metadata$antimicrobialSubstances |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          AWaRe = factor(
            tolower(
              stringr::str_extract(
                .data$WHO_AWARE,
                "^WHO_AWARE_(A|W|R).+$",
                group = 1)),
            levels = c("a","w","r"))) |>
        dplyr::select(code, AWaRe),
      dplyr::join_by("substance_code" == "code")) |>
    dplyr::group_by(event_key, AWaRe) |>
    dplyr::summarise(days = sum(days), .groups = "drop") |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
      names_from = AWaRe,
      values_from = days,
      names_glue = "{AWaRe}_{.value}",
      values_fill = 0L)
}

AWaReDays <- get_AWaRe_days()

risk_time <- data$surveillanceEndData |>
  dplyr::inner_join(AWaReDays, dplyr::join_by(event_key)) |>
  dplyr::reframe(
    across(
      tidyselect::ends_with("_days"),
      sum)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      !"patient_days",
      ~ .x / .data$patient_days * 100,
      .names = "{.col}_rate")) |>
  dplyr::rename_with(~ stringr::str_remove_all(.x, "days_"))

department_risk_time <- data$surveillanceEndData |>
  dplyr::inner_join(AWaReDays, dplyr::join_by(event_key)) |>
  dplyr::inner_join(
    data$events |>
      dplyr::select("event_key","enrollment_key"),
    dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
  dplyr::inner_join(
    data$enrollments |>
      dplyr::select("enrollment_key","department_key"),
    dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$department_key) |>
  dplyr::summarise(across(tidyselect::ends_with("_days"), sum)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      !c("department_key","patient_days"),
      ~ .x / .data$patient_days * 100,
      .names = "{.col}_rate")) |>
  dplyr::rename_with(~ stringr::str_remove_all(.x, "days_"))

risk_rate_quartiles <- department_risk_time |> select(tidyselect::ends_with("_rate")) |> reframe(across(everything(), ~quantile(.x, prob = c(.25,.5,.75))))

table_1 <- risk_time |>
  dplyr::select(!"patient_days" & tidyselect::ends_with("_days")) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = tidyselect::ends_with("_days"),
    values_to = "Usage days") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Factor = .data$name,
    .before = 1,
    .keep = "unused") |>
  dplyr::bind_cols(
    risk_time |>
      dplyr::select(tidyselect::ends_with("_rate")) |>
      tidyr::pivot_longer(
        cols = tidyselect::ends_with("_rate"),
        values_to = "Pooled mean")) |>
  dplyr::bind_cols(
    risk_rate_quartiles |>
      dplyr::bind_cols(tibble::tibble(name = c("Q1","Q2","Q3"))) |>
      tidyr::pivot_wider(
        values_from = tidyselect::ends_with("_rate")) |>
      tidyr::pivot_longer(
        tidyselect::everything(),
        names_pattern = "^(.+)_(Q\\d)$",
        names_to = c("rate",".value"))) |>
  dplyr::select(!tidyselect::all_of(c("name","rate"))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Factor = factor(
      stringr::str_extract(.data$Factor,"^(.+)_days", 1),
      levels = c("cvc","pvc","vs","inv","niv","human_milk","kangaroo_care",
                 "probiotic","ab","a","w","r"))) |>
  dplyr::arrange(Factor) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Factor = dplyr::case_match(
      as.character(.data$Factor),
      "cvc" ~ "Central vascular catheter",
      "pvc" ~ "Peripheral vascular catheter",
      "vs" ~ "Ventilatory support (any)",
      "inv" ~ "Invasive ventilation",
      "niv" ~ "Non-invasive ventilatory support",
      "human_milk" ~ "Human milk",
      "kangaroo_care" ~ "Kangaroo care",
      "probiotic" ~ "Probiotic",
      "ab" ~ "Antibiotics (any)",
      "a" ~ "Access antibiotics",
      "w" ~ "Watch antibiotics",
      "r" ~ "Reserve antibiotics"))

```
